content: The KYC step never completes. It keeps asking me to re-upload my ID again and again.
Onboarding was super simple and I was up and running in minutes.
Withdrawals are stuck in pending for over a week. My email is dev.guy@gmail.com, please help.
Payments work but the confirmation screen is slow to load.
Statements finally show a running balance, much clearer than before.
This is an old review from last year and should be outside the window.
